title: order

messages.description: any number of elements to be split and ordered
ordered lists, with the split elements preceded by index

arguments.description: number of elements to be ordered

methods.description: number of elements in each ordered list

body: [order] splits a list into successive lists of a given size (default 1 element) and tags each of them with ordered indexes. This is useful for sending values to all instances of an object loaded in [clone]!
